debug_info.goal:
case intro
R : Type u_1
inst✝¹ : CommRing R
S : Type u_2
inst✝ : CommRing S
f : R →+* S
x : R ⧸ ker f
x' : R
hx : (@GlimpseOfLean.kerLift R inst✝¹ S inst✝ f) ((Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f)) x') = 0
hx' : (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f)) x' = x
⊢ (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f)) x' = 0

proof:
have h₁ : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = f x' := by
    apply kerLift_mk
  rw [h₁] at hx
  have h₂ : f x' = 0 := by
    simpa using hx
  have h₃ : x' ∈ ker f := by
    rw [mem_ker]
    <;> simp_all
  have h₄ : (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = 0 := by
    have h₅ : (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = 0 := by
      apply Ideal.Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem.mpr
      exact h₃
    simpa using h₅
  simpa using h₄
failed_attempts:
have h1 : (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f)) x' = (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f)) x' := rfl
  have h2 : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = 0 := hx
  have h3 : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = f x' := kerLift_mk f x'
  have h4 : f x' = 0 := by
    calc
      f x' = kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') := by rw [h3]
      _ = 0 := h2
  have h5 : x' ∈ (ker f : Ideal R) := by
    have h6 : f x' = 0 := h4
    simp [Ideal.mem_ker, h6]
  have h6 : (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f)) x' = 0 := by
    have h7 : x' ∈ (ker f : Ideal R) := h5
    have h8 : (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f)) x' = 0 := Ideal.Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem.mpr h7
    exact h8
  simp [h6]

have h₅ : Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x' = 0 := by
    apply Ideal.Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem.mpr
    exact h₄

have h1 : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = f x' := by
    rw [kerLift_mk]
  rw [h1] at hx
  have h2 : f x' = 0 := by simpa using hx
  have h3 : x' ∈ ker f := by
    rw [Ideal.mem_ker]
    simp [h2]
  have h4 : Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x' = 0 := by
    rw [Ideal.Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem]
    exact h3
  simp [h4]

have h₁ : Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x' ∈ (kerLift f) ⁻¹' {0} := by
    rw [Set.mem_preimage]
    exact hx
  have h₂ : x' ∈ ker f := by
    simp_all [kerLift, Ideal.Quotient.lift_apply, Function.funext_iff, SetLike.mem_coe]
    <;>
    (try
      {
        aesop
      }) <;>
    (try
      {
        simp_all [Ideal.Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem]
      }) <;>
    (try
      {
        norm_num
      }) <;>
    (try
      {
        simp_all [Ideal.Quotient.mk_eq_mk_iff_sub_mem]
      })
    <;>
    (try
      {
        aesop
      })
  have h₃ : Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x' = 0 := by
    have h₄ : x' ∈ ker f := h₂
    have h₅ : Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x' = 0 := by
      rw [Ideal.Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem]
      exact h₄
    exact h₅
  simp_all

have h_fx' : f x' = 0 := by
    have h1 : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = f x' := by
      apply kerLift_mk
    rw [h1] at hx
    simpa using hx
  
  have h_x'_in_ker : x' ∈ ker f := by
    simp only [Ideal.mem_ker] at *
    simp_all [map_zero]
    <;>
    aesop
  
  have h_ideal_quotient_zero : Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x' = 0 := by
    rw [Ideal.Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem]
    exact h_x'_in_ker
  
  simpa using h_ideal_quotient_zero

have h1 : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = f x' := by
    apply kerLift_mk
  rw [h1] at hx
  have h2 : f x' = 0 := hx
  have h3 : x' ∈ ker f := by
    rw [Ideal.mem_ker]
    exact h2
  have h4 : Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x' = 0 := by
    rw [Ideal.Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem]
    exact h3
  exact h4

have h₁ : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = 0 := by simpa using hx
  have h₂ : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = f x' := by
    rw [show kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = Ideal.Quotient.lift (ker f) f (fun a ha => by simp [ha]) (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') by rfl]
    simp [Ideal.Quotient.lift_apply]
  rw [h₂] at h₁
  have h₃ : f x' = 0 := by simpa using h₁
  have h₄ : x' ∈ ker f := by
    rw [Ideal.mem_ker]
    exact h₃
  have h₅ : (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = 0 := by
    rw [Ideal.Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem]
    exact h₄
  simpa [hx'] using h₅

have h₃ : f x' = 0 := h₁
  have h₄ : x' ∈ ker f := by
    rw [Ideal.mem_ker]
    exact h₃
  have h₅ : (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = 0 := by
    apply Ideal.Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem.mpr
    exact h₄
  rw [h₅]

have h₂ : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = 0 := hx
  have h₃ : (f x' : S) = 0 := by
    have h₄ : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = f x' := by
      simpa using kerLift_mk f x'
    rw [h₄] at h₂
    exact h₂
  have h₄ : x' ∈ ker f := by
    simpa [Ideal.mem_ker, Function.funext_iff] using h₃
  have h₅ : Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x' = 0 := by
    simpa [Ideal.Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem] using h₄
  exact h₅

have h : f x' = 0 := by
    simpa [kerLift, Ideal.Quotient.lift_apply, Ideal.Quotient.mk_eq_mk_iff_sub_mem] using hx
  have h' : x' ∈ ker f := by
    rw [Ideal.mem_ker]
    exact h
  have h'' : Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x' = 0 := by
    rw [Ideal.Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem]
    <;> simp [h']
  simpa [h''] using hx'

have h₁ : f x' = 0 := by
    have h₂ : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = 0 := by simpa [hx'] using hx
    have h₃ : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = f x' := by
      -- Use the property of kerLift to simplify the expression
      simp [kerLift, Ideal.Quotient.lift_mk]
      <;>
      simp_all [Ideal.Quotient.mk_eq_mk]
      <;>
      aesop
    rw [h₃] at h₂
    exact h₂
  
  have h₂ : (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x' : R ⧸ ker f) = 0 := by
    have h₃ : x' ∈ ker f := by
      -- Since f x' = 0, x' must be in the kernel of f.
      have h₄ : f x' = 0 := h₁
      have h₅ : x' ∈ ker f := by
        rw [Ideal.mem_ker]
        exact h₄
      exact h₅
    -- If x' is in the kernel of f, then the image of x' in the quotient ring is 0.
    have h₄ : (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x' : R ⧸ ker f) = 0 := by
      rw [Ideal.Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem]
      <;> simpa using h₃
    exact h₄
  
  simp_all
  <;>
  aesop

have h : f x' = 0 := by
    calc
      f x' = kerLift f ((Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f)) x') := by
        rw [kerLift_mk]
      _ = 0 := by rw [hx]
  have h₁ : x' ∈ ker f := by
    rw [Ideal.mem_ker]
    exact h
  have h₂ : (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f)) x' = 0 := by
    rw [Ideal.Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem]
    exact h₁
  rw [h₂]

have h : f x' = 0 := by
    have h₁ : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = f x' := by
      rw [kerLift_mk]
    rw [h₁] at hx
    simpa using hx
  have h₂ : x' ∈ ker f := by
    rw [Ideal.mem_ker]
    exact h
  have h₃ : Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x' = 0 := by
    rw [Ideal.Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem]
    exact h₂
  simpa [h₃] using hx'

have h : f x' = 0 := by
    have h₁ : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = f x' := by
      rw [kerLift_mk]
    have h₂ : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = 0 := hx
    rw [h₂] at h₁
    exact h₁
  
  have h_mem : x' ∈ ker f := by
    rw [mem_ker]
    exact h
  
  have h_quot : (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f)) x' = 0 := by
    have h₁ : x' ∈ (ker f : Ideal R) := h_mem
    have h₂ : (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f)) x' = 0 := by

have hx'' : f x' = 0 := by

  have hx''' : x' ∈ ker f := by

  have hx'''' : (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f)) x' = 0 := by

have h1 : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = f x' := by

have h : (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f)) x' = 0 := by
    have h₁ : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = 0 := hx

    have h₅ : (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f)) x' = 0 := by

    have h₅ : x' ∈ ker f := by

      exact h₄
    have h₆ : (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f)) x' = 0 := by
      rw [Ideal.Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem]
      exact h₅
    exact h₆
  exact h₁

have h1 : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = 0 := hx
  have h2 : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = f x' := by
    rw [kerLift_mk]
  rw [h2] at h1
  have h3 : f x' = 0 := by simpa using h1
  have h4 : x' ∈ ker f := by
    rw [mem_ker]
    exact h3
  have h5 : Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x' = 0 := by
    rw [Ideal.Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem]
    exact h4
  rw [h5]
  <;> simp_all

have hx'' : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = 0 := hx
  have h₁ : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = f x' := by
    rw [kerLift_mk]
  rw [h₁] at hx''
  have h₂ : f x' = 0 := hx''
  have h₃ : x' ∈ ker f := by
    rw [mem_ker]
    exact h₂
  have h₄ : Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x' = 0 := by
    rw [Ideal.Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem]
    exact h₃
  simpa [hx'] using h₄

have h : x' ∈ ker f := by
    have h₁ : f x' = 0 := by
      have h₂ : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = f x' := by
        apply kerLift_mk
      rw [h₂] at hx
      exact hx
    exact by
      rw [mem_ker]
      exact h₁
  have h₂ : (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f)) x' = 0 := by
    rw [Ideal.Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem]
    exact h
  rw [h₂]
  <;> simp [hx']

have h : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = 0 := hx
  have h₁ : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = f x' := by
    rw [kerLift_mk]
  rw [h₁] at h
  have h₂ : f x' = 0 := by simpa using h
  have h₃ : x' ∈ ker f := by
    rw [mem_ker]
    exact h₂
  have h₄ : (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = 0 := by
    rw [Ideal.Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem]
    <;> assumption
  simpa [hx'] using h₄

have h1 : f x' = 0 := by
    have h2 : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = f x' := by
      rw [kerLift_mk]
    rw [h2] at hx
    exact hx
  have h2 : x' ∈ (ker f : Set R) := by
    simpa [mem_ker] using h1
  have h3 : Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x' = 0 := by
    apply Ideal.Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem.mpr
    exact h2
  rw [h3]

have h1 : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = 0 := by simpa using hx
  have h2 : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = f x' := by
    rw [kerLift_mk]
  have h3 : f x' = 0 := by
    rw [h2] at h1
    simpa using h1
  have h4 : x' ∈ ker f := by
    simpa [mem_ker] using h3
  have h5 : (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f)) x' = 0 := by
    rw [Ideal.Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem]
    exact h4
  simpa using h5

have h1 : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = f x' := kerLift_mk f x'
  have h2 : f x' = 0 := by
    rw [h1] at hx
    exact hx
  have h3 : x' ∈ ker f := by
    simpa [mem_ker] using h2
  have h4 : Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x' = 0 := by
    apply Ideal.Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem.mpr
    exact h3
  exact h4
